params.prompt:
Create a high-fidelity 16:9 UI concept image for a web lyric app called "湖のソナーレ".
Use the attached reference image only for the transparent liquid glass material, soft rim highlights, subtle caustic reflections, thin borders, and the calm lake-at-twilight mood.

Scene: a realistic wide lake view with distant mountains, torii gate near the waterline, subtle reflected sky and ripples, cinematic twilight-to-night atmosphere. The main visual must remain unobstructed.

Design a production-ready bottom music player control panel integrated into the scene:
- A very thin, elegant glass rail floating just above the bottom edge, about 54px tall, spanning roughly 72% of screen width, centered.
- Transparent liquid glass, not cloudy: background landscape should clearly show through, with only slight blur and saturation.
- A hairline progress bar along the top edge of the rail, glowing like a fine reflection on water; include current progress and a small luminous knob.
- Minimal icon controls in the center: previous track, play/pause, stop, next track. Use refined simple icons, no chunky buttons.
- Left side: compact song title selector with a small down chevron, designed as a tiny translucent pill inside the rail. Do not show a large song list; only hint that it opens.
- Right side: compact time readout and a volume icon with a short minimal slider.
- The UI must feel like a premium music player, not a dashboard, not a debug panel, not a marketing landing page.
- Keep all controls small but legible, aligned to a strict horizontal grid.
- Match the Sonare lake visual language: poetic, Japanese, serene, transparent, water-light reflections.
- No large opaque boxes, no thick panel, no card stack, no extra top panels, no phone mockup, no explanatory text blocks.

Output should look like a polished app screenshot / UI art direction frame, ready to guide HTML/CSS implementation.
